§7§oFreshly crafted Holylight Sword, Smite from Chainsaw, Army of Darkness Defender Super-Enchant.

Freshly crafted Longbow of the Heavens, Power from Abyssalcraft Mass Enchanting, using four Power II books, and four Power I books.

Freshly crafted Kikoku, Sharpness from Crystallite Sword, Eirias Super-Enchant.

§fPeople in need. Powerful enemies.
The might to fight, the compassion to do it for others.
Strategy and tactics. Thought merging with action, for the sake of those who cannot defend themselves.
because they are woth fighting for. Always.
Strength to go on, that can only come from the struggle of another.
Will to endure, because it can make other's lives better.
Acceptance to die, because a cause is worth dying for.
The strength of the Arbiter, missing, but now being brought back.
